positive: A mystical forest creature, stylized as a glowing bioluminescent deer or fawn, standing gracefully in a foggy, twilight meadow. The deer should have highly detailed, crystalline antlers that emit soft, vibrant teal and gold light. It is surrounded by stylized flora: massive fern leaves, glowing mushrooms, and delicate vines. Composition should be central and highly symmetrical, featuring strong, clean silhouettes against a deep indigo and emerald color palette. Minimalist gothic nature aesthetic. Concept art style, deep contrast, volumetric lighting, perfect for screen printing or engraving on fabric, high resolution, 8k, maximal detail.
